---
title: Dynamic Sparse Training of Diagonally Sparse Networks
author:
- Abhishek Tyagi
- Arjun Iyer
- William H Renninger
- Christopher Kanan
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- mlsys
url_source: https://openreview.net/forum?id=bAUVnNc0Ky
code_source: https://github.com/horizon-research/DynaDiag
journ: ICML
year: 2025
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 97
---
